rationale: X's minor findings substantively engage the same fragile-assumption territory the human reviewer flagged (indexing source_outputs[0]/outputs[0] without guards) and independently proposes concrete verification runs, mirroring Bounty-hunter's ask for a specific pytest invocation — each finding is grounded with file:line citations and a concrete fix/test suggestion. Y is essentially a clean APPROVE with thin non-blocking notes (dead param, vague CI caveat, one 'optional' test gap), missing the actual back-and-forth (parent-identity check request, precommit fix, specific test run) that occurred on this PR, so despite being well-grounded it under-covers reviewer concerns and gives little for an author to act on.
